reasoning: While Bad Bunny was Spotify’s top global artist for the years 2020 through 2022, Taylor Swift took the crown in 2023 and 2024. Information from late 2025 search results shows Taylor Swift still dominating most overall streaming metrics and leading in betting volume ($108K vs $63K for Bad Bunny) in the Polymarket 'Top Spotify Artist 2025' market. Although there are articles titled 'Bad Bunny tops Taylor Swift in a new Spotify poll', suggesting he is highly competitive or briefly led, Swift’s massive catalog and continued daily stream dominance make her the favorite. Given Bad Bunny is ostensibly in second place according to the market volume and is the strongest challenger, his probability is likely around 25-30%.
